---
title: "Publications"
canonical-url: https://matyaslevinsky.github.io/publications.html
description: "Publications and policy papers by Matyáš Levínský at PAQ Research."
listing:
  contents: posts/publications
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
toc: false
---

A selection of studies and analyses I authored or co-authored as part of my work at [PAQ Research](https://www.paqresearch.cz/).
